questionsText:
1. Interest-Based Questions (The "What do you like?" filter)

These uncover the raw subjects or activities the visitor naturally gravitates toward.

Q1: When you have free time to read, watch a documentary, or dive into a deep rabbit hole online, which topic naturally grabs your attention?

Q2: Think about a time you felt genuinely accomplished after completing a task. What kind of task was it?

Q3: If you were handed a budget to learn a brand-new practical skill this weekend, which of these sounds most exciting?

Q4: Which school subject or general field of study did you actually look forward to, even if you didn't pursue it further at the time?

2. Environment & Lifestyle Questions (The "Where do you belong?" filter)

These match the visitor's personality and physical comfort levels to their future workplace layout.

Q5: Picture your ideal working layout. Where do you see yourself feeling most focused and energized?

Q6: How do you naturally prefer your daily workflow pace to look?

Q7: When it comes to interacting with people during your shift, what is your preferred balance?

Q8: How do you handle high-pressure, rapidly shifting situations or sudden emergencies?

3. Motivational & Core Values Questions (The "Why do you work?" filter)

These uncover the underlying emotional driver or ultimate career reward the visitor is looking for.

Q9: If you look ahead 5 years, what is the single most important reward or outcome you want to get from your new career?

Q10: When you think about making an impact on the world or your local community, how do you want to deliver it?

Q11: Which of these career safety blankets matters most to you right now?

4. Affinity "Gut-Check" Statements (The "Does this sound like you?" filter)

These act as direct psychological mirrors. If a user nods along to these, they belong in that specific course pathway.

Statement A: "I get deeply satisfied when I can break a complex, frustrating problem down into logical steps and make something work." (Points to: Computer Science / Business)

Statement B: "I stay incredibly calm when things get chaotic around me, and I naturally focus on making sure the people around me feel safe and cared for." (Points to: Nursing / Midwifery / Health Professions)

Statement C: "I am highly analytical. I don't like guesswork—I want to see the raw data, run the experiment, and understand the empirical truth." (Points to: Science)

Statement D: "I am fascinated by human behavior, history, and how systemic social or political issues shape the way our communities live." (Points to: Humanities & Social Science)

Statement E: "I have a hyper-tuned ear for detail. I constantly notice the audio production in media and want to shape how things sound." (Points to: Music Technology)

🛠️ How to Structure the Multiple-Choice Logic

If you are building this into a website widget or form, you can structure the multiple-choice options so that each letter directly tallies a score toward a specific course cluster:

Option A maps to Tech/Business: (Computer Science, Business & Management)

Option B maps to Frontline Healthcare: (Nursing, Midwifery)

Option C maps to Technical/Empirical fields: (Science, Music Technology)

Option D maps to Allied Health & Therapeutics: (Health Professions)

Option E maps to Social/Creative fields: (Humanities & Social Science)

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Coding, technology trends, logic puzzles, software building, gaming mechanics, hardware optimization.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Tech startups, corporate offices, software houses, remote/home office, data centers.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: High earning potential, remote flexibility, a passion for building digital infrastructure, solving complex logical puzzles.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I love breaking down complex problems and writing logical solutions."
"I want to build software that automates and simplifies tasks."

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Human anatomy, healthcare technology, community volunteering, wellness, active team-based environments.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: NHS or private hospitals, community clinics, GP surgeries, residential care homes, military bases.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Desire to save lives, job security, diverse clinical specialisms, a profound sense of public service and human connection.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I stay calm in high-pressure situations and care about patient well-being."
"I want a fast-paced career where no two days are the same."
matrixData.Potential UK Salary Range (Annual): £28,400 – £50,000+ (Band 5 staff nurse up to Band 8 Advanced Practitioner)

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Laboratory experiments, environmental research, data analytics, chemistry, microscopy, wildlife conservation.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Research laboratories, pharmaceutical companies, field research sites, universities, quality control units.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Advancing human knowledge, discovering medical breakthroughs, solving climate/ecological problems, love for empirical evidence.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I am driven to understand how the physical and natural world operates."
"I enjoy conducting controlled experiments and analyzing raw data."

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Therapeutic practices, biological sciences, physical rehabilitation, mental health, community wellness.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Physiotherapy clinics, occupational therapy bays, outpatient centers, sports complexes, community health teams.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Helping individuals regain physical or cognitive independence, offering holistic care outside of traditional nursing paths.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I want to help people physically recover and regain their independence."
"I am fascinated by how lifestyle factors impact long-term health."

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Neonatal care, reproductive health, family support systems, pregnancy wellness, physiological education.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Maternity wards, birthing centers, neonatal intensive care units (NICU), domestic home-visit settings.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Guiding families through life-changing transitions, championing women's health choices, bringing new life into the world safely.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I want to support and empower women through pregnancy and childbirth."
"I am highly observant and deeply empathetic during vulnerable moments."

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Sound engineering, digital audio workstations (DAWs), acoustics, instrument synthesis, live sound mixing, media composition.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Recording studios, live concert venues, post-production houses, game design studios, broadcasting stations.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Obsession with sonic perfection, translating emotion into audio, working alongside creative talent, shaping modern entertainment media.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I hear details in music production that most people completely miss."
"I want to shape the soundscapes of films, video games, or albums."

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: History, literature, sociological trends, politics, cultural anthropology, reading, community advocacy.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Social service offices, civil service sectors, NGOs, museums, heritage sites, policy think-tanks, secondary schools.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Desiring to fix systemic social issues, preserving cultural history, influencing public policy, teaching future generations about society.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I am fascinated by how history, culture, and politics shape our daily lives."
"I want to advocate for marginalized communities and drive social change."
matrixData.Potential UK Salary Range (Annual): £24,000 – £45,000+ (Varies greatly: Social Work, Civil Service, or Heritage paths)

matrixData.Potential Student Interests: Economics, corporate strategy, marketing metrics, financial markets, leadership, entrepreneurship.
matrixData.Career Work Environments: Corporate headquarters, financial institutions, consulting firms, remote management spaces, retail offices.
matrixData.Motivations for Entering Career: Building a startup, driving organizational efficiency, financial independence, leading and mentoring cross-functional teams.
matrixData.Sample Affinity Statements:
"I enjoy organizing resources, optimizing processes, and managing projects."
"I like analyzing market trends to make strategic commercial decisions."

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Analytical Builder: Highly logical, values autonomy/remote work, loves solving system puzzles, driven by high earning potential and modern tech environments.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option A responses across interests, workspace preference (remote/office), and problem-solving affinity.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Your Mind is Built for Code: Step into a High-Value Tech Career.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Download the Computer Science Syllabus & Speak with a Tech Enrolment Advisor.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Tech job market trends 2. Student success stories from non-coding backgrounds 3. Financing options.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Frontline Guardian: Resilient, empathetic, thrives in high-pressure team settings, values job security and deep interpersonal public service connection.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option B responses across core traits, workspace preference (NHS/Hospitals), and emergency composure.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Answer Your True Calling: Transform Lives on the Frontlines of Healthcare.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Check University Degree Entry Requirements for Nursing & Book a Career Call.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Navigating NHS Band 5 salary/benefits 2. Balancing shift work with online learning 3. Interview tips.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Empirical Investigator: Driven by fact, data, and curiosity. Prefers controlled environments like labs, wants a career focused on discovery, pharmacy, or research.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option C responses across interest fields, empirical analytics preference, and research environment options.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Unlock the Universe: Advance Human Knowledge with a Career in Science.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: View the Science Diploma Core Modules & Talk to a Learning Advisor.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Choosing your branch (Biochem vs Chemistry vs Environmental) 2. How lab practicals work 3. University pathways.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Rehabilitative Healer: Loves biology and wellness but prefers long-term lifestyle/physical rehabilitation care over acute emergency nursing.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option D responses across interest profiles, Allied Health settings (Physio/Occupational clinics), and rehabilitation values.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Empower Longevity & Recovery: Become an Essential Allied Health Professional.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Explore Physiotherapy, Radiography & Podiatry Pathways with an Expert.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Overview of Allied Health careers 2. Graduate salary expectations 3. Flexible study timelines.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Empowering Advocate: Intensely observant, deeply empathetic, fascinated by reproductive health, seeks a deep vocational focus bringing new life into the world safely.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Combination of Option B & D responses, specifically selecting neonatal care, pregnancy wellness, and women's health choices.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Support New Beginnings: Step into the Vital, Rewarding World of Midwifery.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Download Midwifery Course Guide & Check NHS Student Funding Eligibility.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. A day in the life of a modern Midwife 2. Entry requirements for competitive uni spots 3. Student support groups.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Sonic Architect: Highly creative yet technically minded, possesses an acute ear for details, driven to shape the soundscapes of media, music, or entertainment.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option C & E mixed responses, explicitly selecting sound engineering, studio environments, and acoustic media production filters.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Shape the Future of Sound: Launch Your Career in Professional Music Tech.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Watch Our Music Technology Graduate Showcase & Review Studio Requirements.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Modern audio engineering software requirements 2. Monetizing sound design 3. University degree choices.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Social Catalyst: Deep interest in history, human behavior, culture, and public policy. Wants a career advocating for communities, social justice, or education.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Predominantly Option E responses emphasizing community wellness, public policy, NGOs, and human cultural evolution factors.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Drive Meaningful Change: Shape Communities through Humanities & Social Sciences.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Schedule a Consultation with a Social Science Career Specialist.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. Diverse career paths (Social work, teaching, politics) 2. Essay writing tools for adults 3. Financial aid rules.

outcomesData.__EMPTY_1: The Strategic Leader: Commercially minded, values financial independence, entrepreneurship, organizational layout optimization, and team development metrics.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_2: Combination of Option A & E responses emphasizing economics, strategic consulting, leadership, and financial market outcomes.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_3: Lead with Impact: Fast-Track to Executive & Entrepreneurial Success.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_4: Apply for Your Interest-Free Business Diploma Payment Plan Today.
outcomesData.__EMPTY_5: Send 3-part email series: 1. The ROI of an online Business Diploma 2. Developing managerial leadership skills 3. Networking groups.
